description.de: 60 Minuten Mat Pilates direkt am See. Fokus auf Atmung, Mitte und Beweglichkeit. Bring deine Matte mit, danach Matcha gemeinsam am Wasser.
description.en: 60 minutes of mat pilates right by the lake. Focus on breath, centre, and mobility. Bring your own mat; matcha together by the water afterwards.

meeting_point.en: Mythenquai, lawn by the lake pool
